title: AI-SDLC Journey v1
description: Journey declaration schema per RFC-0018 In-Soul Journey Pattern. A journey is a temporally-ordered user flow within a Soul DID or Variant with named states, transitions, completion criteria, accessibility requirements, and success metrics. Journeys are scoring scopes — not a runtime workflow engine. Schema-enforced flat: journeys[] cannot contain nested journeys[] (OQ-3 resolution). Completion criteria closed enum: terminal-success-state | all-states-reached (OQ-4 resolution). Compliance floor must be 'inherit' when scope=variant (§5.3 bounded inheritance).

id.description: Journey identifier. Kebab-case, unique within parent scope (Soul DID or Variant). Used as the journey-id segment in targetedJourneys URI references.

scope.description: Whether this journey applies to the whole Soul ('soul') or a specific Variant ('variant:<id>'). Variant-scoped journeys MUST carry complianceFloor: 'inherit'.

states.description: Named states for this journey. At least 2 states required; at least 1 MUST have terminal: true AND successState: true.

id.description: State identifier, kebab-case, unique within this journey. Referenced by substrate code and transition 'from'/'to' fields.

terminal.description: Whether this state ends the journey flow. Terminal states MUST specify successState.

successState.description: Required when terminal=true. true = journey-success (the completion target); false = explicit failure-state (e.g. abandoned, error-timeout) — surfaces as an analytics signal.

transitions.description: State-to-state transitions. 'from' may be a single state id or an array (any-of). 'to' must be a single state id.

oneOf.description: Any-of originating state ids (shorthand for multiple transitions sharing the same trigger and target).

trigger.description: Event or action that drives this transition (e.g. 'user-signup', 'session-timeout-30d').

completionCriteria.description: How 'done' is defined for this journey. OQ-4 resolution: closed enum for v1 (terminal-success-state | all-states-reached). Future activation via Decision: journey-custom-predicate-activation-request (auto-promote at >=2 distinct adopter requests; future language: CEL).

kind.description: Completion kind. 'terminal-success-state' = reaching a state where terminal=true AND successState=true constitutes completion. 'all-states-reached' = all declared states must be visited at least once.

target.description: Required when kind='terminal-success-state'. The state id of the success terminal state.

accessibility.description: WCAG level, version, and conformance target for this journey. May set a HIGHER wcagLevel than the parent Soul/Variant (RFC-0018 §5.3). MUST NOT lower below parent.

wcagLevel.description: Minimum WCAG conformance level. Journey may set higher than soul/variant default (e.g. AAA for regulatory-submission journey).

wcagVersion.description: WCAG specification version. Additive enum per OQ-7 resolution: existing journeys keep their declared version; new journeys can pick the latest. Declaration of 2.0 emits Decision: wcag-version-superseded (advisory, no scoring impact).

conformanceTarget.description: Percentage of WCAG criteria that must pass for this journey. Assumes binary conformance model (WCAG 2.x). WCAG 3.0 may require a scoringModel discriminant in a future RFC (OQ-7 forward-compat note).

auditCadence.description: Required audit frequency. Overdue audits trigger graduated Eρ₅ degradation per OQ-6 resolution: 0-30d warn → 30-60d -25% → 60-90d -50% → 90d+ effective-block. Per-Soul config (accessibility.auditOverdueGracePolicy) can select stricter modes (binary-30d, hard-block) for SOC2/HIPAA shops.

successMetrics.description: Quantified success signals at journey scope. Feeds Sα₂ + Cκ scoring — Cκ boosts work that addresses this journey when completion-rate is below alertBelow threshold.

target.description: Target metric value (e.g. 0.65 for 65% completion rate).

alertBelow.description: When the metric falls below this value, Cκ scoring is boosted for work targeting this journey.

alertAbove.description: When the metric rises above this value (for time-based metrics), Cκ scoring is boosted.

targetSeconds.description: For time-based metrics: target duration in seconds.

designImperatives.description: Journey-scoped Sα₂ inputs layered on soul + variant level per most-specific-wins (journey > variant > soul). Feeds Vibe Coherence scoring at journey scope.

complianceFloor.description: Required when scope=variant. MUST be 'inherit' — journeys cannot diverge from parent compliance regime (RFC-0018 §5.3 bounded inheritance). Schema validation rejects any other value.
